title: Paths to Root Privileges
description: A flowchart illustrating the primary methods for a regular user to become the super user (root) in a UNIX system, focusing on the su and sudo commands and their security implications.
relationships: User executes 'su' and provides root password to gain a root shell
User executes 'sudo' and provides their own password (if configured) for temporary elevated privileges
sudo access is granted and logged based on rules in /etc/sudoers
